Package pjv.controller

Class ClientHandler

java.lang.Object
pjv.controller.ClientHandler
public class ClientHandler
extends java.lang.Object
This class handles incoming client connection, enables sending and receiving messages from client.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Michal Pechník and Oľga Ostashchuk

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    ClientHandler​(java.net.Socket socket)
    The ClientHandler class constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    boolean checkUniquenessOfUserName​(java.lang.String userName)
    This method checks whether the username chosen by client is already in the database.
    void closeConnection()
    This method closes communication and connection with connected client.
    Client getClient()
    This method gets Client instance of connected client.
    boolean isExitThread()
    This method gets the value of variable which stores data whether client has closed the application.
    boolean isFirstInputCompleted()
    This method gets value of variable which stores information whether first message with client data was already received from client.
    static java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> parseArrayList​(java.lang.String strList)
    This method parses String message to the ArrayList instance.
    static Message parseMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
    This method parses String message to the Message instance.
    java.lang.String prepareArrayList​(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> list)
    This method converts ArrayList instance of String values to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
    java.lang.String prepareArrayListOfMessage​(java.util.ArrayList<Message> list)
    This method converts ArrayList instance of Message values to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
    java.lang.String prepareMessage​(Message message)
    This method converts Message instance to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
    void sendAllMessages()
    This method sends all public messages sent in the selected chatRoom on this day and sends private massages sent in the selected chatRoom on this day in case the client is their sender or receiver.
    void sendChatRoomsToClient()
    This method sends list of names of currently existing chatRooms to connected client.
    void sendMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
    This method sends String message to connected client
    void setClient​(Client client)
    This method sets Client instance of connected client.
    void setExitThread​(boolean exitThread)
    This method sets the value of variable which stores data whether client has closed the application.
    void setFirstInputCompleted​(boolean firstInputCompleted)
    This method sets value of variable which stores information whether first message with client data was already received from client.
    void takeInputClientData()
    This method saves message from client, parses it to ArrayList instance and checks the input username in the database.
    void takeMessage()
    This method saves message from client, parses it to Message instance, saves the message to the database and sends to all connected clients in the same chatRoom if receiver's name is not stated, otherwise server checks the receiver's name in database and sends the message only to sender and receiver.
    void takeMessageFromClient()
    This method takes input message from client.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ClientHandler

      public ClientHandler​(java.net.Socket socket)
      The ClientHandler class constructor. It initializes socket, incoming messages scanner and outcoming messages PrintWriter.
      Parameters:
      socket - Socket

  • Method Details

    • takeMessageFromClient

      public void takeMessageFromClient()
      This method takes input message from client.

    • takeMessage

      public void takeMessage()
      This method saves message from client, parses it to Message instance, saves the message to the database and sends to all connected clients in the same chatRoom if receiver's name is not stated, otherwise server checks the receiver's name in database and sends the message only to sender and receiver.

    • takeInputClientData

      public void takeInputClientData()
      This method saves message from client, parses it to ArrayList instance and checks the input username in the database. Then it sends answer to client.

    • sendAllMessages

      public void sendAllMessages()
      This method sends all public messages sent in the selected chatRoom on this day and sends private massages sent in the selected chatRoom on this day in case the client is their sender or receiver.

    • checkUniquenessOfUserName

      public boolean checkUniquenessOfUserName​(java.lang.String userName)
      This method checks whether the username chosen by client is already in the database.
      Parameters:
      userName - String username of client to be checked
      Returns:
      boolean value

    • sendChatRoomsToClient

      public void sendChatRoomsToClient()
      This method sends list of names of currently existing chatRooms to connected client.

    • prepareMessage

      public java.lang.String prepareMessage​(Message message)
      This method converts Message instance to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
      Parameters:
      message - Message to be sent to client

    • prepareArrayList

      public java.lang.String prepareArrayList​(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> list)
      This method converts ArrayList instance of String values to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
      Parameters:
      list - ArrayList of String values to be sent to client

    • prepareArrayListOfMessage

      public java.lang.String prepareArrayListOfMessage​(java.util.ArrayList<Message> list)
      This method converts ArrayList instance of Message values to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
      Parameters:
      list - ArrayList of Message instances to be sent to client

    • parseMessage

      public static Message parseMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
      This method parses String message to the Message instance.
      Parameters:
      strMessage - String message to be parsed
      Returns:
      Parsed Message instance

    • parseArrayList

      public static java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> parseArrayList​(java.lang.String strList)
      This method parses String message to the ArrayList instance.
      Parameters:
      strList - String to be parsed
      Returns:
      Parsed Arraylist instance

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage​(java.lang.String strMessage)
      This method sends String message to connected client
      Parameters:
      strMessage - String message to be sent.

    • closeConnection

      public void closeConnection()
      This method closes communication and connection with connected client.

    • setExitThread

      public void setExitThread​(boolean exitThread)
      This method sets the value of variable which stores data whether client has closed the application.
      Parameters:
      exitThread - boolean

    • isExitThread

      public boolean isExitThread()
      This method gets the value of variable which stores data whether client has closed the application.
      Returns:
      boolean value

    • setClient

      public void setClient​(Client client)
      This method sets Client instance of connected client.
      Parameters:
      client - Client

    • getClient

      public Client getClient()
      This method gets Client instance of connected client.
      Returns:
      Client instance

    • isFirstInputCompleted

      public boolean isFirstInputCompleted()
      This method gets value of variable which stores information whether first message with client data was already received from client.
      Returns:
      boolean value

    • setFirstInputCompleted

      public void setFirstInputCompleted​(boolean firstInputCompleted)
      This method sets value of variable which stores information whether first message with client data was already received from client.
      Parameters:
      firstInputCompleted - boolean
